title: Fix Date Sorting in Refresh Modal with Descending Default
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the refresh modal to properly sort data by date in ascending and descending order with descending as the default, so that I see the most recent refresh operations first.
description:
The refresh modal's date sorting was not functioning correctly. The data was not properly sorted when toggling between ascending and descending order.

### Changes
- Fixed date-based sorting to work correctly for both ascending and descending
- Set default sort to date descending (most recent first)
acceptance_criteria: Date column sorting works correctly in ascending order
Date column sorting works correctly in descending order
Default sort is date descending (most recent first)
Clicking the sort header toggles between ascending and descending
ux_changes: Fixed date sorting in the refresh modal. Default sort is now date descending, showing the most recent operations first.
implementation_notes: Date comparison logic was corrected for proper chronological sorting. Default sort order set to descending on initial modal open.
comment_summary: Developer deployed the fix to production for review.
